name: cipherhub
description: Production-grade cryptography toolkit exposing 31 cryptographic operations via MCP. Covers classical algorithms (AES, RSA, ECC, SM2/3/4, ZUC), post-quantum cryptography (ML-KEM FIPS 203, ML-DSA FIPS 204, X25519+ML-KEM-768 Hybrid KEX), and has passed interoperability certification with AWS KMS (64/64) and Tencent Cloud KMS (39/39).

resources.name: Supported Algorithms
resources.description: Complete catalog of all cryptographic algorithms supported by CipherHUB

resources.name: Tool Categories
resources.description: Mapping of all 31 MCP tools organized by category

resources.name: AWS KMS Interoperability Report
resources.description: CipherHUB vs AWS KMS interoperability verification (64/64 passed)

resources.name: Tencent Cloud KMS Interoperability Report
resources.description: CipherHUB vs Tencent Cloud KMS interoperability verification (39/39 passed)
